query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A pale circular light source dominates the center of the frame, surrounded by several dark vertical forms of varying heights that appear to be human silhouettes standing on a horizontal surface, against a pale background with soft tonal gradations.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, dreamlike scene dominated by a pale circular light source resembling the sun or moon, with indistinct human silhouettes dissolving into soft-edged vertical forms; the image features extreme intentional blur that smears all detail, muted faded tones in pale yellow and gray, and an abstract quality where figures and environment merge into gesture and atmosphere rather than resolving into recognizable forms.
